versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   local-ai-3-4-2                  true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: local-ai
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: local-ai-3-4-2
      name: local-ai
      namespace: local-ai
      values: |
        local-ai:
          persistence:
            models:
              accessModes:
               - ReadWriteOnce
            output:
              accessModes:
               - ReadWriteOnce
